title: Pennsylvania Disability Claims Adjudicator Rates (ST Pay Schedule, eff 2025-07-01)
description: Pennsylvania DDS examiner series — Disability Claims Adjudicator Trainee (job code 45070, Pay Scale Group ST06), Disability Claims Adjudicator (45080, ST07), and Disability Claims Adjudicator Supervisor (45140, ST08) — on the PA Standard Pay Schedule (Pay Scale Type ST). Pay-grade assignments and min/max annual salaries (75-hour and 80-hour bases) are verified from the official PA Commonwealth Careers job specifications and expanded pay-information (PayExp) pages. Adjudicators are SEIU Local 668 bargaining unit F4; the supervisor is F5. Dollar figures reflect the current ST schedule effective 2025-07-01.

columns.name: classes.<class>.pay_scale_group
columns.description: PA ST pay scale group (ST06/ST07/ST08), verified from the official job spec.

columns.name: classes.<class>.annual_min
columns.description: Annual minimum (75-hour basis) for the assigned ST group.

columns.name: classes.<class>.annual_max
columns.description: Annual maximum (75-hour basis) for the assigned ST group.

columns.name: classes.<class>.annual_min_80hr
columns.description: Annual minimum at the 80-hour biweekly basis.

columns.name: classes.<class>.annual_max_80hr
columns.description: Annual maximum at the 80-hour biweekly basis.

source.publisher: Commonwealth of Pennsylvania (Commonwealth Careers / Office of Administration); PA Dept of Labor & Industry (DLI) Bureau of Disability Determination
source.title: PA Standard Pay Schedule (Pay Scale Type ST) + Disability Claims Adjudicator job specifications, effective 2025-07-01

update_cadence: annual ST schedule revision / CBA cycle (SEIU 668)
notes: Authoritative: pay-grade assignments (job code → ST pay scale group) and min/max annual salaries verified from the official PA Commonwealth Careers job-spec and PayExp pages (45070 → ST06, 45080 → ST07, 45140 → ST08). Both conditions met (official schedule dollar figures + verified grade mapping from the same official source). 75-hour basis is the standard 37.5 hr/week work week for these F4/F5 classes; 80-hour figures also recorded. Replaces prior agent-inferred SC-grade estimates, which were wrong on the classification system. cba_terms_verified is false (SEIU 668 wage-grid appendix not separately retrieved — not needed, the official ST schedule is authoritative).
